Family-run joinery and roofing specialists in Prescot

Domestic and commercial work across Merseyside and the Northwest

Joinery and roofing you can rely on

We are a family-run building company based in Prescot, covering Merseyside and the Northwest. We do joinery and roofing for homeowners, landlords and commercial clients — and we do it right.

Get a quote View recent work
Why clients call us

Straight answers and a job done right

  • You deal with us directly from the first call to the finished job.
  • Separate joinery and roofing teams, each with the right experience.
  • Registered limited company (no. 15420682).
Call direct 07939 551481
Company no. 15420682
Prescot based Working across Merseyside and the wider Northwest
30+ years Hands-on trade experience across joinery and roofing
Domestic + commercial Comfortable in occupied homes and live working sites
Registered Ltd Companies House no. 15420682

What we do

Joinery and roofing from one company

Two dedicated teams with the right skills for each trade. Whether it is fitted furniture or a full re-roof, you get people who know the work inside out.

Joinery division

Fitted furniture, staircases and site carpentry

From bespoke wardrobes and staircase work to structural framing and commercial fit-outs. If it involves timber and a good finish, we cover it.

  • Bespoke fitted furniture and storage
  • First and second fix carpentry
  • Structural timber framing and site work
  • Fencing, gates and outdoor joinery
Explore joinery Domestic and commercial work
Roofing division

Slating, tiling, flat roofs and repairs

Full re-roofs, lead work, Velux windows, storm damage, guttering — we handle the lot, for homes and commercial buildings.

  • Slating, tiling and full re-roofs
  • Flat roofing systems for extensions and commercial sites
  • Lead work, Velux and roof lights
  • Repairs, storm damage and planned maintenance
Explore roofing Planned works and responsive repairs

Why us

What you get from us

No hard sell, no surprises. Just good work from people who have been doing this for over 30 years.

30+ years in the trade

We have seen most problems before. That means better advice and fewer surprises once the job starts.

Honest quotes

We come out, look at the job and give you a clear price. No obligation, no pressure.

Tidy on site

We clean up after ourselves, work around your schedule and treat your home the way we would treat our own.

Commercial work too

Shops, offices, warehouses — we are used to working around other trades and keeping to a programme.

Recent work

A selection of recent joinery and roofing work across domestic and commercial projects.

Joinery

Fitted kitchen

Handleless units, worktops and splashback fitted for a clean, practical finish.

Joinery

Oak and metal balustrade

New oak handrail and black metal balustrade fitted to an existing staircase.

Roofing

Natural slate roof

Natural slate roofing finished with clean lines and proper detailing.

See more recent work in the gallery

What people say

A few words from recent clients

Short notes from homeowners and commercial clients we have worked for recently.

"Brilliant craftsmanship, tidy workers and everything finished when they said it would be."
Paul T, Prescot
"Professional from start to finish, fair on price and no stress at any point."
Sandra K, Whiston
"Reliable team, no drama on site and exactly the sort of people you want on a commercial job."
Dave R, Knowsley

Free quotes

Got a job in mind? Give us a call

Tell us what you need and we will give you honest advice and a clear price. No obligation.
